## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what happened.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- **Node.js**: [e.g., v20.12.0]
- **AI Provider**: [Gemini / OpenAI]

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs.
